categories.title: Introduction
categories.description: Welcome to Rustlings! Get started with the basics.

categories.title: Variables
categories.description: Learn about variable bindings and mutability in Rust.

categories.title: Functions
categories.description: Learn how to define and use functions in Rust.

categories.title: If
categories.description: Learn about conditional expressions in Rust.

categories.title: Primitive Types
categories.description: Explore Rust's built-in primitive types.

categories.title: Vectors
categories.description: Learn about Rust's Vec<T> growable array type.

categories.title: Move Semantics
categories.description: Understand Rust's ownership and move semantics.

categories.title: Structs
categories.description: Learn how to define and use structs in Rust.

categories.title: Enums
categories.description: Learn about Rust's powerful enum type.

categories.title: Strings
categories.description: Understand String and &str in Rust.

categories.title: Modules
categories.description: Learn how to organize code with modules.

categories.title: Hashmaps
categories.description: Learn about Rust's HashMap collection type.

categories.title: Options
categories.description: Learn about Rust's Option type for handling absence of values.

categories.title: Error Handling
categories.description: Learn Rust's approach to error handling with Result and the ? operator.

categories.title: Generics
categories.description: Learn about generic types and functions in Rust.

categories.title: Traits
categories.description: Learn about traits, Rust's way of defining shared behavior.

categories.title: Lifetimes
categories.description: Understand lifetime annotations and how Rust ensures reference validity.

categories.title: Tests
categories.description: Learn how to write and run tests in Rust.

categories.title: Iterators
categories.description: Learn about Rust's powerful iterator trait and methods.

categories.title: Smart Pointers
categories.description: Learn about Box, Rc, Arc, and Cow smart pointer types.

categories.title: Threads
categories.description: Learn about concurrent programming with threads in Rust.

categories.title: Macros
categories.description: Learn about Rust's macro system for metaprogramming.

categories.title: Clippy
categories.description: Learn to write idiomatic Rust by fixing Clippy lints.

categories.title: Type Conversions
categories.description: Learn about Rust's type conversion traits and casting.

categories.title: Algorithms
categories.description: Implement classic algorithms in Rust.

categories.title: Quizzes
categories.description: Test your knowledge with quizzes covering multiple topics.
